---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect rendering, input, windowing, or runtime behavior.
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Use this for behavior that is wrong but does not crash Renderide.
For crashes, hangs, GPU device loss, panics, or startup failures, use the crash report template.
For behavior that should match Unity, use the Unity parity template.
-->

**Description**
<!-- Describe the bug in one or two paragraphs. Include what you were doing and what looked or behaved wrong. -->


**Repro steps**
<!-- Ideally, provide the shortest reliable path we can run or inspect. Include world/content names only if needed. -->

1.
2.
3.

**Expected vs observed behavior**
<!-- Clearly describe what you expected, and what Renderide did instead. -->

Expected:

Observed:


**Extra materials**
<!-- Screenshots, videos, validation logs, GPU captures, API traces, or small repro assets can go here. Label Unity and Renderide captures when comparing. -->


**Logs / platform**
<!--
Attach or paste the relevant renderer log. It already includes version, target, config, graphics API, GPU selection, validation state, and startup diagnostics.
Include host/bootstrapper logs too if they help. If logs are unavailable, say why.
-->
